title: Effects of different exercise training on gene expression of Rac1 and PAK1 in healthy rat fast- and slow-type muscles
author: Saara Laine
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Data sets used in the manuscript “Effects of different exercise training on gene expression of Rac1 and PAK1 in healthy rat fast- and slow-type muscles”. Data includes; weight, maximal oxygen consumption and normalized qPCR and RPPA values.
steps_raw: Data sets used in the manuscript “Effects of different exercise training on gene expression of Rac1 and PAK1 in healthy rat fast- and slow-type muscles”. Data includes; weight, maximal oxygen consumption and normalized qPCR and RPPA values.
